items.name: Make Bundles Free Again Hat
items.description: "Avatars are an essential part of your identity on Roblox and bodies and heads are the foundation. Therefore, we want to encourage the creation of bodies and heads and give people greater access to them by excluding upload fees and price minimums". This decision was later reverted. MAKE BUNDLES FREE AGAIN!
